name: Beef with Asparagus
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Asparagus, sliced on the diagonal
1 Celery stalk, sliced on the diagonal
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice beef and marinate in soya sauce, wine, and salt.
2. Slice the remaining ingredients (onion, asparagus, celery).
3. Heat oil in a wok until it reaches the smoking point.
4. Stir-fry beef and onion for about 3 minutes. Remove to a platter.
5. Add asparagus and 3 tablespoons water to the wok. Stir and cover.
6. Cook for 3 minutes, lifting the cover once or twice to stir the asparagus.
7. Add celery and cook for another 2 minutes with the wok covered.
8. Lift the cover once to stir all ingredients together.
9. Return the beef to the wok and mix everything well.
10. Serve.
NOTE: A corn starch gravy may be added to the above recipe if desired. Chicken or pork can be used in place of beef, retaining them in the wok while asparagus and celery are cooking. It is suggested that the asparagus be cut diagonally as it requires a fair amount of cooking time.
